# Fortémi Documentation

> Fortémi documentation portal for the self-hosted server and the browser/React packages.

## Primary Docsites

- [Fortémi Server Docs](https://docs.fortemi.com/server/): Rust server, PostgreSQL, hybrid search, MCP, multimodal ingestion, encryption, operations, API reference.
- [Fortémi React Docs](https://docs.fortemi.com/react/): Browser packages including @fortemi/core, @fortemi/graph, and @fortemi/react.

## Bot-Friendly Discovery

- [Server static pages](https://docs.fortemi.com/server/pages/welcome-overview.html)
- [Server sitemap](https://docs.fortemi.com/server/sitemap.xml)
- [Server llms.txt](https://docs.fortemi.com/server/llms.txt)
- [React sitemap](https://docs.fortemi.com/react/sitemap.xml)
- [React llms.txt](https://docs.fortemi.com/react/llms.txt)

## Notes

Use the server docs for hosted/self-hosted Fortémi deployment and API operation.
Use the React docs for browser-only package integration.
